records.ety: [Cf. D. koet, W. cwtair; cwta short, bodtailed + iar hen; cf. cwtau to dock. Cf. Cut.]

defs: A wading bird with lobate toes, of the genus Fulica. The common European or bald coot is Fulica atra (see under bald); the American is Fulica Americana
The surf duck or scoter. In the United States all the species of (Œdemia are called coots. See Scoter.
A stupid fellow; a simpleton; as, a silly coot.
